args.body:
Hi Maya, 

This is an overview of your schedule for this week: 

Monday: Q3 roadmap review with Maya (11:00 – 12:00), Daily standup (09:30 – 10:00), 1:1 with Sam (14:00 – 14:30) 
Tuesday: Vendor demo: Acme Cloud (10:00 – 11:00), Customer feedback workshop (13:00 – 14:30) 
Wednesday: Architecture review board (09:00 – 10:00), Meeting prep — leadership sync (11:00 – 11:30), Leadership sync (16:00 – 17:00) 
Thursday: Deep work block (10:00 – 12:00), Design review (14:00 – 15:00) 
Friday: Team retro (11:00 – 12:00), End-of-day wrap (15:00) 

The 3 most important events for you and the company are: 
1. Q3 roadmap review with Maya (Monday, 11:00 – 12:00) - This is a quarterly check-in where Maya will share board feedback and discuss the hiring plan draft. 
2. Customer feedback workshop (Tuesday, 13:00 – 14:30) - Maya will facilitate this workshop to synthesise user research from May. 
3. Leadership sync (Wednesday, 16:00 – 17:00) - This is a status update for the leadership team, where Maya will discuss the latest developments. 

Best regards, [Your Name]
